.file-embed.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(4, 8, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #282828 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#282828, color-mix(in srgb, #282828 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #282828 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#282828, color-mix(in srgb, #282828 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(4, 8, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(4, 8, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(30, 30, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(4, 8, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(30, 30, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(4, 8, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(60, 60, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(15, 17, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(15, 15, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
